headline: Canada Reflects a More Measured Path to Connected Living with Rising Expectations for Flexibility and Trust
summary: TORONTO, June 30, 2026--Assurant, Inc. (NYSE: AIZ), a global company that redefines the boundaries of protection – safeguarding and servicing connected devices, homes, automobiles, and commercial equipment in partnership with the world’s most successful brands, today highlighted Canada-specific insights from its 2026 Global Connected Consumer Trends Report, underscoring broader global shifts in how connected technology is becoming essential to everyday life.
